title: Logo Visibility Issue in GitHub Dark Theme
body: It might seem minor, but I spotted the "containers" logo in the [`containers/.github`](https://github.com/containers/.github) repo that features black text on transparent backgrounds. Unfortunately, these don't display properly when I view the "containers" organization in GitHub's dark theme. ### Screenshots For instance, here's a screenshot to illustrate: Compare the same screenshot but in the light theme: ### Proposed solution One of the solutions is to use separate [logos](https://github.com/containers/common/tree/main/logos) for the Dark and Light theme. See: - https://docs.github.com/en/get-started/writing-on-github/getting-started-with-writing-and-formatting-on-github/quickstart-for-writing-on-github#adding-an-image-to-suit-your-visitors - https://alexandear.github.io/posts/2025-11-10-github-unreadable-dark-logo/

comments.body: @rhatdan ill come up with a fix
